positive: A stylized minimalist illustration of a crescent moon embracing a stylized constellation of shooting stars and ethereal wisps of cloud. The overall aesthetic is cosmic fantasy meets vintage celestial map etching. Strong use of negative space, high contrast between deep indigo and starlight gold, with subtle watercolor washes adding depth. Composition is perfectly centered, ideal for a wearable print. Clean line art, Art Nouveau influences, vector style, designed for DTG printing, hyper-detailed yet simple enough to scale.
negative: blurry, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, copyright, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, noisy, amateur, ugly
